2603.25570.title: TAAC: A gate into Trustable Audio Affective Computing
2603.25570.paper_summary: With the emergence of AI techniques for depression diagnosis, the conflict between high demand and limited supply for depression screening has been significantly alleviated. Among various modal data, audio-based depression diagnosis has received increasing attention from both academia and industry since audio is the most common carrier of emotion transmission. Unfortunately, audio data also contains User-sensitive Identity Information (ID), which is extremely vulnerable and may be maliciously used during the smart diagnosis process. Among previous methods, the clarification between depression features and sensitive features has always serve as a barrier. It is also critical to the problem for introducing a safe encryption methodology that only encrypts the sensitive features and a powerful classifier that can correctly diagnose the depression. To track these challenges, by leveraging adversarial loss-based Subspace Decomposition, we propose a first practical framework \name presented for Trustable Audio Affective Computing, to perform automated depression detection through audio within a trustable environment. The key enablers of TAAC are Differentiating Features Subspace Decompositor (DFSD), Flexible Noise Encryptor (FNE) and Staged Training Paradigm, used for decomposition, ID encryption and performance enhancement, respectively. Extensive experiments with existing encryption methods demonstrate our framework's preeminent performance in depression detection, ID reservation and audio reconstruction. Meanwhile, the experiments across various setting demonstrates our model's stability under different encryption strengths. Thus proving our framework's excellence in Confidentiality, Accuracy, Traceability, and Adjustability.
2603.25570.paper_summary_zh: 隨著AI技術在抑鬱症診斷中的出現，抑鬱症篩檢的高需求與有限供應之間的衝突已顯著緩解。<lb/>在各種模態數據中，基於音頻的抑鬱症診斷因為音頻是情感傳遞中最常見的載體而受到學術界和產業界的越來越多關注。<lb/>不幸的是，音頻數據也包含用戶敏感身份信息（ID），這些信息極其脆弱，並可能在智能診斷過程中被惡意使用。<lb/>在以往的方法中，抑鬱特徵和敏感特徵之間的區分始終是一個障礙。<lb/>引入一種安全的加密方法論，只加密敏感特徵，以及一個能夠正確診斷抑鬱症的強大分類器，對於解決這一問題至關重要。<lb/>為了應對這些挑戰，我們通過利用基於對抗損失的子空間分解，提出了一個首個實用框架\name，旨在進行可信音頻情感計算，以在可信環境中通過音頻自動檢測抑鬱症。<lb/>TAAC的關鍵推動因素是區分特徵子空間分解器（DFSD）、靈活噪聲加密器（FNE）和分階訓練範式，分別用於分解、ID加密和性能增強。<lb/>與現有加密方法進行的廣泛實驗展示了我們框架在抑鬱症檢測、ID保留和音頻重建方面的卓越性能。<lb/>同時，在不同設置下的實驗展示了我們模型在不同加密強度下的穩定性。<lb/>從而證明了我們框架在保密性、準確性、可追溯性和可調整性方面的優越性。
2603.25570.author: Xintao Hu et.al.
